subject: ap-chemistry
title: Gas Laws & Properties
stimulus: A student is doing experiments with CO

parts.prompt:

scoring_points.description: Describe the effect of raising the temperature on the motion of the CO (g) molecules.

required_elements: Describe the effect of raising the temperature on the motion of the CO (g) molecules.
alternatives.correct_example: The average speed of the molecules increases as temperature increases.
